results.rendered_html:
apodaka (1. apa + udaka) adj.
1〉 wasserlos, wasserdicht: nauḥ  ṚV. 1,116,4 .
— 2〉 nicht wässerig, nicht flüssig: viṣam  AV. 5,13,3 . 7 . 16,11 .

results.rendered_html:
apodaka a. Ved.
1 Waterless; water-tight (nauḥ  Rv. 1. 116. 3 ).
2 Not watery, not fluid.
— kaṃ [ apakṛṣṭamudakaṃ yasmāt] Poison &c. that removes water (jalāpakarṣahetuviṣādi).
